attributes.action: winter and summer hours for school (start earlier in summer and later in winter)
attributes.background:
12-6 in the winter
7-1 in the summer

rejection.details:
School policies are devolved in Scotland and anyway may not even be the responsibility of the Scottish Government but of governing bodies for individual schools or school groups (as in England and Wales)

You may wish to try starting a petition at the Scottish Parliament website: 
https://petitions.parliament.scot/
